positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a vibrant, mystical neon forest scene. The main subject is a group of diverse, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, butterflies, foxes) nestled among intricately stylized, oversized leaves. The overall aesthetic is vaporwave meets natural surrealism. Composition must be centralized, allowing for clean borders suitable for apparel printing. Use strong silhouettes against a deeply saturated gradient background (teal, indigo, magenta). Line work should be crisp and graphic, with vibrant pop-art color blocking and deep shadows. Volumetric lighting emanating from the glowing elements, creating high contrast and depth. Style: Flat vector art, high saturation, graphic design, concept art, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, ugly, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muddy colors, photo-realistic, gradient background artifacts
